# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
  }

  parameters {
    string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Registry base URL (e.g., registry.example.com:5000). Leave empty for Docker Hub.')
    string(name: 'IMAGE_NAME', defaultValue: 'my-app', description: 'Image name/repository (e.g., team/my-app or my-app)')
    string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: 'latest', description: 'Image tag (e.g., v1.2.3)')
    string(name: 'DOCKERFILE', defaultValue: 'Dockerfile', description: 'Path to Dockerfile')
    string(name: 'BUILD_CONTEXT', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Docker build context directory')
  }

  environment {
    DOCKER_CLI_EXPERIMENTAL = 'enabled'
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        script {
          def registry = (params.REGISTRY_URL ?: '').trim()
          def imageName = (params.IMAGE_NAME ?: '').trim()
          def tag = (params.IMAGE_TAG ?: '').trim()
          def dockerfile = (params.DOCKERFILE ?: 'Dockerfile').trim()
          def contextDir = (params.BUILD_CONTEXT ?: '.').trim()

          if (!imageName) {
            error('IMAGE_NAME is required')
          }
          if (!tag) {
            error('IMAGE_TAG is required')
          }

          def imageRef = registry ? "${registry}/${imageName}:${tag}" : "${imageName}:${tag}"

          sh """
            set -euo pipefail
            docker version
            docker build -f '${dockerfile}' -t '${imageRef}' '${contextDir}'
          """
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Push') {
      steps {
        script {
          def registry = (params.REGISTRY_URL ?: '').trim()
          def imageName = (params.IMAGE_NAME ?: '').trim()
          def tag = (params.IMAGE_TAG ?: '').trim()
          def imageRef = registry ? "${registry}/${imageName}:${tag}" : "${imageName}:${tag}"

          sh """
            set -euo pipefail
            docker push '${imageRef}'
          """
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      script {
        def registry = (params.REGISTRY_URL ?: '').trim()
        def imageName = (params.IMAGE_NAME ?: '').trim()
        def tag = (params.IMAGE_TAG ?: '').trim()
        if (imageName && tag) {
          def imageRef = registry ? "${registry}/${imageName}:${tag}" : "${imageName}:${tag}"
          sh """
            set +e
            docker rmi '${imageRef}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
          """
        }
      }
      cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
    }
  }
}
